Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Text: respondedexistence AssembleLoanOfferPackage requires QualityAssuranceReview to also occur coexistence GatherAdditionalDocuments and AuthorizeContractTerms must both occur response ReceiveApplication must be followed by PreliminaryCreditCheck eventually precedence QualityAssuranceReview must be preceded by AuthorizeContractTerms so AuthorizeContractTerms before QualityAssuranceReview succession PreliminaryCreditCheck must occur before GatherAdditionalDocuments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: altresponse TransferFunds must be followed by NotifyCustomer altprecedence NotifyCustomer must be preceded by TransferFunds altsuccession GatherAdditionalDocuments and QualityAssuranceReview must alternate chainresponse AssembleLoanOfferPackage must be immediately followed by TransferFunds chainprecedence AuthorizeContractTerms must be immediately preceded by PreliminaryCreditCheck chainsuccession QualityAssuranceReview must be immediately followed by AssembleLoanOfferPackage

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: noncoexistence TransferFunds and ReceiveApplication cannot both occur but ReceiveApplication must occur init existence so if TransferFunds occurs violation noncoexistence means they cannot both appear in the same trace so loan process cannot have both which seems contradictory

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets list all constraints and see if we can find a valid trace Init ReceiveApplication first Existence ReceiveApplication and GatherAdditionalDocuments must occur Response After ReceiveApplication must have PreliminaryCreditCheck Succession PreliminaryCreditCheck before GatherAdditionalDocuments Coexistence GatherAdditionalDocuments requires AuthorizeContractTerms Chainprecedence AuthorizeContractTerms immediately after PreliminaryCreditCheck

Name: Validation - PE
Text: altsuccession GatherAdditionalDocuments requires QualityAssuranceReview after it Chainsuccession QualityAssuranceReview to AssembleLoanOfferPackage Chainresponse Assemble to TransferFunds but then noncoexistence with ReceiveApplication violation so model inconsistent because Gather existence forces chain to TransferFunds which conflicts

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Given this its likely the user expects us to describe the process ignoring the inconsistency or note that its a model and describe the intended flow perhaps the noncoexistence is a mistake or represents a rejection path but existence forces Gather which forces the chain

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will produce a description that follows the positive constraints and treat the negative constraints as restrictions to prevent illegal orders Ill describe the process as if the noncoexistence is not present or mention it as a constraint that would typically be violated provide a coherent description that ignores that one constraint
